title: FoxLib
description: This is a utility designed for mods by foxiwhitee
body:
# FoxLib

**_If you want to talk about the mod, help, or just find out about development news, visit our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/Td59WbfApr)_**

## About This Mod
### **This mod is designed for GTNH version of mods!**

This mod adds the ability to do json crafts and automatic integration with minetweaker. Adds a convenient config creation system. Adds some API for AE2. (AE2 is not required.) This API allows you to make improved versions of molecular assemblers. Adds the ability to make your own blocks with more than 32 channels. For example, cables and wireless. And many useful utilities. The mod also adds items: performance modules. These items are common to some mods
